title: Two Fatal Crashes Occur in Catawba County
summary: Two deadly crashes in Catawba County happened within hours. No charges are expected to be filed in either incident.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of road safety and the potential for preventative measures.

title: Deadly Crash on I-85 South Under Investigation
summary: Emergency crews responded to a deadly crash on I-85 South in Charlotte near Little Rock Road early Saturday morning.
charlotte_impact: Impacts traffic and raises concerns about highway safety and emergency response times.

title: Dry Weekend Followed by Rain and Cooler Weather
summary: A mainly dry weekend will give way to rain on Monday as a cold front brings showers and cooler weather, with sunshine returning by Tuesday.
charlotte_impact: Provides a weather forecast impacting weekend plans and potentially affecting outdoor activities.

title: Competency Hearing Set for Man Charged with Murder
summary: Decarlos Brown, charged with killing Iryna Zarutska, faces multiple state and federal charges, including first-degree murder. A competency hearing is scheduled.
charlotte_impact: Addresses a serious crime and the legal process involved in determining the defendant's mental state.

title: Woman Raped at Vape Shop in North Charlotte, Suspect Arrested
summary: A woman was raped at the Arbor Smoke Shop on Wednesday in north Charlotte. A suspect has been arrested, according to court records.
charlotte_impact: Raises concerns about safety in commercial areas and the effectiveness of law enforcement.

title: Foxx Urges Rethink of I-77 Toll Expansion Impact
summary: Former Charlotte Mayor Anthony Foxx calls for a rethink of the I-77 toll lane expansion, citing its potential impact on Black neighborhoods.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the social equity implications of infrastructure development and community displacement.

title: CMS Board to Review Updated Budget Proposal
summary: The CMS board will review an updated budget proposal on Friday after rejecting the superintendent's $2.1 billion proposal on April 28 with an 8-1 vote.
charlotte_impact: Impacts funding for schools and educational programs, affecting students and teachers.

title: Water Leak Unfixed Near School Before Drought
summary: Charlotte Water let a leak near a school sit unfixed for almost a year before drought. The city loses 15% of its water annually.
charlotte_impact: Exposes infrastructure problems and mismanagement of resources during a critical water shortage.

title: 73-Year-Old Woman Accused of Killing Husband
summary: Patty Griffin, a 73-year-old woman, is charged with second-degree murder in Union County for allegedly killing her husband.
charlotte_impact: Involves a serious crime and raises questions about domestic violence and elder abuse.

title: Man Convicted in Brooks Sandwich House Shooting Convicted of 3 More Murders
summary: Steven Staples, previously tied to the deadly Brooks Sandwich House shooting, has been convicted of three more murders, escalating his criminal history.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the severity of violent crime and the justice system's response.

title: Appeals Court Upholds Conviction of Madalina Cojocari's Stepfather
summary: The appeals court upholds the conviction of Madalina Cojocari's stepfather, Christopher Palmiter, rejecting his claims of unconstitutionality and insufficient evidence.
charlotte_impact: Continues the legal proceedings related to a high-profile missing person case.

title: Truist Championship Generates $125M Economic Impact
summary: The Truist Championship at Quail Hollow has generated a $125M economic impact. Golf generates $4.2 billion annually for North Carolina.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the economic benefits of sports tourism and major events for the state.

title: NTSB Releases Report on Mooresville Tanker Explosion
summary: The NTSB releases a preliminary report on the deadly Mooresville tanker explosion, which killed the truck driver and injured another person.
charlotte_impact: Addresses a tragic accident and the investigation into its causes to prevent future incidents.

title: Water Restrictions Across Charlotte Area Due to Drought
summary: Exceptional drought conditions prompt mandatory water restrictions across the Charlotte area, requiring residents to conserve water.
charlotte_impact: Impacts daily life and highlights the urgency of water conservation and resource management.

title: Union County School Board Approves $174 Million Budget
summary: The Union County school board approves a $174 million budget, prioritizing staff pay with projected 5% raises for teachers and other employees.
charlotte_impact: Affects school funding and employee compensation, impacting the quality of education.
